name: coTfsSDOChkEntryExists
title: coTfsSDOChkEntryExists
syntax: long coTfsSDOChkEntryExists( dword index, dword subindex );
description: This function checks with a SDO upload if the object is readable.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Object index in the object dictionary.

parameters.name: subindex
parameters.description: Object sub index in the object dictionary.

return: Error code or one of the following values
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
